summary: Created skill_usage.py for tracking activations and skill_evolution.py for weekly health analysis. Documents/System/Skills-Spec.md already contains SkillRL frontmatter fields. Skills/_archived/ created for deprecation flow.

decisions.decision: Usage stored in JSONL not SQLite
decisions.rationale: Append-only, simple, grep-able, consistent with other logs

decisions.decision: Evolution agent outputs digest to N5/review/skills/
decisions.rationale: Centralizes all skill-related review in one location

decisions.decision: Skills-Spec.md already existed with SkillRL fields
decisions.rationale: Avoided duplicate work — spec was created in prior conversation

learnings: JSONL is the right format for append-only logs that need grep-ability
broadcast: Evolution agent ready — create weekly scheduled agent with: python3 Skills/pulse/scripts/skill_evolution.py analyze
